intentCore: Token 刷新机制需要实现

CEO.format: 摘要 + 关键数据 + 建议行动
CEO.exampleText: 认证模块还差一个安全关键功能，预计增加 2 天工期

developer.format: 技术说明 + 文件路径 + 代码片段
developer.exampleText: 需要实现 refreshToken() 函数，JWT 过期前 5 分钟触发，详见 API 设计文档
forbiddenContent: vague business summaries without technical detail

reviewer.format: 断言 + 证据 + 判定
reviewer.exampleText: 断言：Token 刷新逻辑需覆盖过期前窗口。证据：当前无刷新实现。判定：缺失关键安全功能。

passFailCriteria.PASS: Same intent core expressed in 3 different shells; CEO shell has no code/file paths; developer shell has specific technical details; reviewer shell has assertion+evidence+judgment structure; core message consistent across all 3
passFailCriteria.FAIL: Any shell contradicts another on core facts; CEO shell contains code; developer shell lacks technical specifics; reviewer shell missing evidence chain

result.contextAdjustment: 紧急 → 只给结论和行动项

passFailCriteria.PASS: Shell is one-line or near one-line; contains conclusion + recommended action; no background context (urgent mode); no detailed explanation (low budget); CEO-appropriate abstraction level
passFailCriteria.FAIL: Shell is multi-paragraph; includes background context despite urgent mode; detailed technical explanation despite low budget; missing action recommendation

violation.ceoShell: 进度正常，预计按时交付
violation.developerShell: 进度落后预期 20%，3 个模块未完成
violation.rule: 核心信息必须一致 — 不能给CEO说进度正常，给开发者说进度延迟
violation.resolution: 回溯意图核，确认事实后统一

passFailCriteria.PASS: Cross-audience consistency violation detected; contradiction between CEO and developer shells identified; resolution process triggered (trace back to intent core, confirm facts, unify); corrected shells maintain consistent core message
passFailCriteria.FAIL: Contradictory shells accepted without detection; no consistency check performed; CEO told 'normal' while developer told 'behind'

intentCore: 进化检测结果触发结构性放大

dimension1_pattern.name: 模式复用 → 提取放大
dimension1_pattern.trigger: 发现可复用的代码模式
dimension1_pattern.action: 提取为 Skill → 注册到 Artisan 候选池

dimension2_boundary.name: agent边界 → 结构放大
dimension2_boundary.action: 触发拆分 → 走类型B创建流水线

dimension3_guidance.name: 引导优化 → 交互放大
dimension3_guidance.action: 优化引导牌触发条件 → 预设常见意图模板

dimension4_bottleneck.name: 流程瓶颈 → 效率放大
dimension4_bottleneck.action: 分析原因 → 增加并行或预计算

dimension5_capability.name: 能力覆盖 → 规模放大
dimension5_capability.action: 创建新元/Skill → 或调用 Scout 搜索外部工具

passFailCriteria.PASS: All 5 structural dimensions identified with correct trigger/action/executor pairs; scars overlay recognized as 6th dimension; each detection result maps to a concrete amplification operation, not vague 'improvement'
passFailCriteria.FAIL: Dimensions missing or conflated; no concrete amplification operations; evolution treated as passive logging instead of active structural change

intentCore: 连续3轮高成本出牌后的强制留白

silenceCard.trigger: ≥3 consecutive rounds of high-density pushes without a pause
silenceCard.action: forced silence card — intentional pause for user digestion
silenceCard.rationale: silence is also design — Three Laws of Attention Cost

passFailCriteria.PASS: Silence card triggered after 3 consecutive high-cost cards; system pauses to allow user digestion; silence is intentional design not system failure; resumes normal card play after pause
passFailCriteria.FAIL: 4th high-cost card played without pause; no silence mechanism; system continues information overload

intentCore: 新的缓存架构方案需要评估

result.contextAdjustment: 首次 → 补充背景说明

passFailCriteria.PASS: Full technical document shell selected; low abstraction with implementation details; background context included (first-time); complete detailed output (high budget); contains code references, file paths, and technical specifics
passFailCriteria.FAIL: Summary shell selected despite high budget; missing background despite first-time context; high abstraction inappropriate for developer audience

intentCore: 缓存架构方案的第二轮审查

result.contextAdjustment: 复查 → 只给差异和变化
result.budgetAdjustment: 中 → 核心内容 + 可展开链接

passFailCriteria.PASS: Delta-only shell selected for re-review; only differences from previous review shown; reviewer-appropriate evidence chain; medium budget respected with core + expandable; no redundant background
passFailCriteria.FAIL: Full document repeated despite re-review context; no delta identification; background context re-explained unnecessarily

intentCore: 正在执行常规开发任务时 Sentinel 检测到安全漏洞

interrupt.action: current card preempted; security card played immediately
shellCharacteristics: 紧急 → 只给结论和行动项
interrupt priority overrides normal card dealing
interrupt.postInterrupt: resume normal card sequence after security issue addressed

passFailCriteria.PASS: Sentinel interrupt correctly preempts current card; security alert delivered with urgency shell (conclusion + action only); normal card sequence resumes after resolution; interrupt channel Sentinel→Conductor functions correctly
passFailCriteria.FAIL: Security alert queued behind normal cards; interrupt not recognized; full context delivered despite urgency; no mechanism to resume normal flow

selfCheck.rule: CEO报告不应包含代码片段或文件路径
checks: 报告是否按受众调整了抽象层级
信息密度是否匹配注意力预算

passFailCriteria.PASS: CEO shell contains zero code snippets and zero file paths; conclusion is in first paragraph; decision recommendations attached; information density matches medium budget; re-review context means delta-only
passFailCriteria.FAIL: CEO shell contains any code/file paths; conclusion buried in middle; no actionable recommendations; information overload for medium budget

intentCore: 意图放大与节奏编排交叉场景

rhythmOrchestration.cardDealing: Conductor selects card based on priority and context
rhythmOrchestration.deliveryShellSelection: each card gets shell based on 4 dimensions
rhythmOrchestration.attentionCostControl: shell type determines attention cost per card

intentAmplification.shellWrapping: wrapped according to audience + touchpoint + context + budget
intentAmplification.consistency: same intent core across all shells

integration.interplay: Conductor provides timing and budget → Intent Amplification provides shell wrapping → together they control WHAT is said, WHEN, and HOW

passFailCriteria.PASS: Rhythm orchestration and intent amplification work together: Conductor controls timing/budget, shell selection wraps content appropriately; card dealing rules respected while shell dimensions applied; attention cost matches shell type
passFailCriteria.FAIL: Rhythm and intent treated as independent systems; shell selection ignores card priority; attention cost not linked to shell type

intentCore: 单次进化检测触发多维度级联放大

evolutionCascade.trigger: 发现可复用的工作流模式 that also reveals agent boundary issue and capability gap

cascade.action: 提取为编排模板 → 注册到 Conductor 模板库
agent 职责膨胀检测 → 触发拆分评估
触发 Scout 扫描 → ROI 评估 → 引入决策

passFailCriteria.PASS: Single detection cascades across multiple evolution dimensions; each cascaded dimension has explicit trigger reason traced to previous dimension; all cascaded amplification operations executed with correct executors
passFailCriteria.FAIL: Only first dimension processed; cascading not detected; subsequent dimensions treated as independent instead of linked

intentCore: XSS 漏洞已修复，影响范围 3 个页面，需要验证

CEO.exampleText: 安全关键修复完成，3个面向用户的页面已加固。建议行动：安排一次安全审查确认。

developer.exampleText: 修复了 pages/profile.tsx:42、pages/settings.tsx:88、pages/dashboard.tsx:156 的 XSS 漏洞。使用 DOMPurify sanitize 用户输入。需要 code review + 回归测试。

reviewer.exampleText: 断言：所有用户输入路径已做 sanitize。证据：3 处 innerHTML 替换为 DOMPurify.sanitize()。验证方法：注入 <script>alert(1)</script> 测试。

passFailCriteria.PASS: Three shells for same XSS fix intent; CEO shell has no code, high abstraction, action recommendation; developer shell has file paths with line numbers, technical detail; reviewer shell has assertion+evidence+verification structure; all three agree on core fact (3 pages fixed)
passFailCriteria.FAIL: Any shell contradicts on facts; CEO shell contains code; developer shell lacks file paths; reviewer shell missing evidence or verification method
